evals.prompt: I'm a DTC beauty brand and want to start using LTK to work with influencers. How do I get started?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to getting started with the LTK Brand Platform and creator outreach

assertions.name: free_platform
assertions.description: Response mentions the free Brand Platform as a starting point, noting that it includes creator discovery, gifting, and a dashboard at no cost

assertions.name: creator_discovery
assertions.description: Response explains how to find relevant creators using LTK's discovery tools, mentioning category or audience matching

assertions.name: gifting_workflow
assertions.description: Response describes a gifting or product seeding approach as an initial strategy before paid campaigns

evals.prompt: What's the difference between LTK Connect Launch, Pro, and Enterprise? Which should I pick?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of LTK Connect pricing tiers with recommendations

assertions.name: tier_comparison
assertions.description: Response compares at least the three Connect tiers covering price points and creator limits per month

assertions.name: spend_caps
assertions.description: Response mentions yearly spend limits or caps that differ between tiers

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Response provides guidance on which tier suits different brand sizes or campaign volumes

evals.prompt: I want to amplify a creator's post about my product. What LTK ad products can I use?
evals.expected_output: Overview of LTK's paid amplification options including Boost, Ads, and CTV

assertions.name: boost
assertions.description: Response explains LTK Boost as a way to amplify specific creator content with paid media

assertions.name: multiple_products
assertions.description: Response mentions at least two paid amplification products beyond just Boost, such as LTK Ads or LTK CTV

assertions.name: use_case_matching
assertions.description: Response suggests which product fits the user's scenario of amplifying an existing creator post
